reviews.review_text: My attorney prepared me for every hearing and explained each step of the custody process.
Good outcome overall. Sometimes it took a day to get updates after court.
I felt the billing statements were confusing even though the legal advice was solid.
They treated my case with empathy and never made me feel judged.
We had one miscommunication about a filing deadline, but it was corrected quickly.
Hard to reach my lawyer directly. I usually spoke to staff and waited for callbacks.
They focused on what was best for my kids and helped de-escalate conflicts.
Office staff was kind, but I wish I had a clearer written roadmap early on.
They remembered details about my schedule and tried to avoid hearings on days I had my kids.
Judge’s decision wasn’t what I hoped, but the firm was honest about the risks.
I appreciated the direct communication style even when the news was hard to hear.
Very responsive by email. I always knew when the next court date was.
Mediation preparation was excellent. I felt confident walking in.
Sometimes I got long emails without a clear summary of what I needed to do.
They gave me scripts for how to talk to my co-parent, which helped a lot.
Case strategy changed a few times and I didn’t always understand why.
Billing was fair and they warned me when a motion would be more expensive.
The paralegal was a lifesaver helping organize texts and emails for evidence.
Sometimes the lobby was crowded, but everyone was professional.
They prioritized safety issues and helped me get a protective order quickly.
There were a few times when I had to repeat background details to different people.
Overall good experience. More frequent check-ins would have been nice during quiet periods.
They respected my budget and suggested options to minimize court time.
Emails sometimes came late at night, which made it hard to disconnect.
They were very organized with exhibits and prepared for trial even though we settled.
I felt like my concerns about school drop-offs weren’t fully addressed.
They helped me focus on long-term outcomes, not just winning every argument.
Court filings were timely and accurate. Office phone queue can be long on Mondays.
They checked on my emotional wellbeing, not just legal details. That mattered a lot.
We won some issues and lost others. I wish I’d had more clarity on realistic outcomes early.
Overall, I’d recommend them. Just be ready with questions so you don’t leave confused.
They helped negotiate a parenting plan that actually works with my job schedule.
Sometimes emails were dense, but when I asked for a summary they provided it.
I occasionally felt like my case was one of many, not a priority.
They walked me through every possible scenario before trial so I felt prepared.
Good communication once I learned the best way to reach them (email over phone).
